exploration_notes: Fixed 4 locations in django/contrib/admin/filters.py to prevent empty filters from rendering in the admin sidebar. (1) FieldListFilter.has_output() base class now checks for a lookup_choices attribute before defaulting to True. (2) RelatedFieldListFilter.has_output() adds an explicit early return for the empty case. (3) ChoicesFieldListFilter gets a new has_output() that checks field.flatchoices. (4) AllValuesFieldListFilter gets a new has_output() that checks lookup_choices count.
